## Journal.IFillingRecipeJournalRecord.entries property

Optional detailed journal entries recording what actually happened. When present, provides a complete audit trail of the cooking session.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly entries?: ReadonlyArray<IJournalEntry>;
```
